input.subject: Parent-Teacher Conference Scheduled - Emma Johnson
input.snippet: Your parent-teacher conference for Emma has been scheduled...
input.body_text:
Dear Johnson Family,

Your parent-teacher conference for Emma has been scheduled.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
CONFERENCE DETAILS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Student: Emma Johnson (3rd Grade)
Teacher: Mrs. Thompson

Date: Thursday, February 19, 2026
Time: 4:15 PM - 4:35 PM
Location: Room 203, Lincoln Elementary
          500 School Lane
          Pleasantville, CA 94025

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

During our conference, we will discuss:
• Emma's academic progress
• Social development
• Upcoming curriculum
• Any questions or concerns

Please arrive on time as conferences are scheduled back-to-back.

If you need to reschedule, please contact me as soon as possible.

I look forward to meeting with you!

Best regards,
Mrs. Thompson
3rd Grade Teacher
Lincoln Elementary School
mrsthompson@lincolnelementary.edu
